name: 情感衝擊型＋懸念型（雙重身份揭露預告）
description: 每一幕結束時都留下更大的懸念——女主身份還有更多層未揭露，男主也隱藏著秘密。觀眾被迫繼續觀看以獲得完整的真相。
tags: 各段落結尾的最後一句台詞

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: It's time to tell Shang Yian that I'm the one running Chongqing International. / Yen Yen, we'll be seeing each other again real soon.
examples.context: 各段落結尾的最後一句台詞
